productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Ditsy Polka Blue Grey Shirt
description: CompositionBlue blouson t-shirt with grey polka dots, made of 100% cotton, has a band collar with an open V-neck running into a front full buttoned placket with fabric buttons, short sleeves with elasticated hems, flaired panel at the waist with mild gathers on the chest and rounded hemline with brand badge stitched at the left waistFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Don that completely casual look in this polka dot cotton t-shirt from wrangler. The band collar with a V-neck leading to a fabric buttoned placket and the short sleeves with elasticated hems enhance your feminine factor. Team this with jeans or skirts and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
